# Distill long emails with MySQL and Discord hands-free

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route آ· **Level:** Advanced آ· **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Distill long emails with MySQL and Discord hands-free. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual ocr & extraction is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook â†’ Read Recent from MySQL â†’ Newest First â†’ Trim to Digest Size â†’ Summarize Content (AI) â†’ Post Digest to Discord â†’ Archive Digest in MySQL â†’ â€¦

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating ocr & extraction in legal
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Standardizes the process every time
- Scales without extra headcount
- Saves hours of manual work each week

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Discord webhook URL; Groq API key; MySQL connection; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: ًںں¦ entry آ· ًںںھ AI آ· ًںں« actions آ· â¬œ utilities آ· ًںں© outputs آ· ًںں¥ error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath â€” read those before editing.

## Try it now
Sample data is pinned on the trigger â€” hit **Execute Workflow** to watch it flow through every node before connecting any real credentials. Unpin the trigger (right-click â†’ Unpin) when you're ready to go live.

## Design decisions

Summarization uses a Chain, not an Agent, because the step is fixed â€” there's no decision about which tool to call, just 'summarize this text.' Posting to multiple channels runs as parallel branches, not sequential sends, so a slow API on one channel never delays the message that was already ready on another.

## Practice exercises

You've got the basics covered â€” push further:

1. Add a third notification channel and watch the Merge node's input count update.
2. Change 'Trim to Digest Size' from 15 to 5 and see how it narrows the summary's scope.
3. Swap the Summarization Chain for a Q&A Chain to answer questions instead of just recapping.

## ًں›ں Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3أ— with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail â†’ context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## ًں”گ Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials â€” never in node parameters.

## ًں¤– AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens â€” keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## ًں›  Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see ًں”‘ lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your ocr & extraction process. Every node card explains its role â€” safe to extend at any marked branch.
